title: Create Account
subtitle: Create a new account to get started with Coder.

createAccount.title: Create Account
createAccount.description: Join your organization on Coder to start building workspaces.

email.label: Email Address
email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

username.label: Username
username.invalid: Username must be 1-64 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

terms.required: You must agree to the terms to continue

actions.signIn: Already have an account? Sign in

messages.success: Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account.
messages.failed: Failed to create account. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the verification link.

resend.title: Didn't receive the email?
resend.wait: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before requesting another email.

messages.success: Email verified successfully! You can now sign in.
messages.error: An error occurred while verifying your email.

request.title: Reset Your Password
request.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

messages.success: Password reset email sent! Please check your inbox.
messages.failed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
messages.throttled: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.

messages.success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in with your new password.
messages.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may be expired.

accountSetup.title: Complete Your Profile
accountSetup.description: Tell us a bit more about yourself.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.description: This is how other users will see you

bio.label: Bio
bio.description: A brief description of your role or interests

messages.failed: Failed to complete profile. Please try again.
messages.canCompleteLater: You can complete your profile later in settings.

auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address first
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
auth.serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{minLength}} characters
validation.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Please include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
validation.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms to continue

network.connectionFailed: Failed to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

help.needHelp: Need help? Check our documentation or contact support.
